blended.narrative: Ski Wentworth is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
